data.body: Env ready: worktree venv installed (repo build of rebar resolves), commit-msg hook present. Session log 52f0. Epic claim BLOCKED: stale attestation (plan materially edited since round-3 review) -> re-running review-plan on epic + 6fe2 in background. Also exploring creation seams. LANDING DECISION: using a stacked relation chain on refs/for/main (not the feature branch the epic plan names) -- the 3 stories are a strict linear depends_on chain worked by ONE agent; skill+CLAUDE.md reserve feature branches for parallel/multi-agent work, and a stacked chain lands each trailer on origin/main gated by both votes with submit-the-top atomic ordering (identical AC outcome), avoiding feature-branch-driver friction.
